name: Specifying the Delegated-Autonomy Boundary: Requirements Engineering for Agentic AI
summary: arXiv:2607.17225v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agentic AI systems do not just predict or recommend; they plan, maintain state, and act in external environments with varying degrees of autonomy....
description: arXiv:2607.17225v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agentic AI systems do not just predict or recommend; they plan, maintain state, and act in external environments with varying degrees of autonomy. This changes the requirements engineering problem in a specific and under-addressed way: it introduces what we call the delegated-autonomy boundary -- the set of decisions about what may be delegated...
author: Chetan Arora, Andreas Vogelsang, Abbi Sharma
